case_title: JONATHAN K WILKS VS. AUTONOMY INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTONOMY INC.
